styleBlock: FLAT-VECTOR editorial illustration: fine, confident, thin dark linework over clean flat colour fills; crisp modern vector look; stylised grown-up faces. Warm, bright morning-to-daytime light and a vivid, saturated palette of amber, terracotta, sage green, sky blue and cream. Landscape book-cover framing with a generous, confident composition. HARD GUARD-RAILS, never violate: absolutely NO text, letters, numbers, words, labels, signage-with-writing or logos anywhere in the image (blank signs only). EVERY person is an adult aged roughly 25 to 55, NEVER elderly, NEVER children or teenagers. This applies to background and crowd figures too: every extra in a queue, room, street or sofa is also a young or middle-aged adult, NEVER grey-haired, white-haired or bearded elders, NEVER kids. NO 3D or Pixar/Disney render, NO cartoon mascot, NO Duolingo/Babbel app look, NO anime or kawaii cuteness, NO photorealism, NO painterly gouache, NO sepia, vintage or film grain, NO dark, gloomy or somber tones.
note: Single source of truth for cover style. scripts/generateCover.ts ALWAYS prepends styleBlock; the model only supplies the scene. The pre-bash-guard hook blocks any cover generation that does not go through generateCover.ts. To change the style, the user approves a new reference and this file is edited (visible in the diff).
